corrected_fields.summary: This source is a table of contents/listing page for ECB Macroprudential Bulletin Issue 32 (November 2025), presenting article titles and brief descriptions on macroprudential topics. The content covers extensions to the 2025 EU-wide stress test, including bank deleveraging dynamics, contagion risk integration, climate risk assessment, and scenario severity frameworks. No specific quantitative data, findings, or market-moving figures are provided in this source.
